expectations.text: Issue is labeled/typed as enhancement, not bug.
Skill asks what behavior the user wants (enhancement-specific prompt).
expectations.evidence: Draft includes 'Desired behavior' section from enhancement prompt.

expectations.text: Output includes environment info and a plugin log section.
expectations.evidence: Environment captured; Plugin Logs <details> with scrubbed tail.

expectations.text: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
expectations.evidence: Stopped at confirm step; gh not run.
